root_cause: Node 'node-1' is under multiple resource pressure conditions (MemoryPressure, DiskPressure) causing unstable scheduling and eviction behavior

causes.message: Node reports simultaneous pressure conditions: MemoryPressure, DiskPressure
Node resource contention leads to eviction or scheduling instability

likely_causes: Disk and memory pressure occurring simultaneously
Large number of Pods competing for node resources
suggested_checks: Check node resource usage (CPU, memory, disk)
